productDisplayName: Peter England Men Elements Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet holder from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic piece.Dimensions: 8.6 cm x 10 cmOne main compartmentThree credit card slots on the right side of the walletTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideFlaps on either side of the wallet, with the left flap being transparentBranding embossed on the frontAggressive stitch detailing on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
